# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.2.0] - 2026-05-06

### 🚀 Features

- Add tx3_invoke MCP tool
- Rewrite tx3_invoke to use tx3-sdk (resolve-only)

### 🚜 Refactor

- Type tx3_invoke and tx3_apply_args args as map of structured values

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Mirror cargo-release + git-cliff config from trix

## [0.1.0] - 2026-05-06

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Mirror trix's cargo-dist release and clippy workflows
- Replace clippy.yml with full CI workflow (fmt, clippy, test)
- Renumber to 0.1.0
